segments.text: Japanese school had a massive crisis.
65% of the students refused to finish
their milk. But one genius trick fixed
it instantly. Milk is healthy, but kids
found it boring and often left it
unfinished. The waste was piling up and
the schools were desperate. They could
not change the flavor, so they had to
change the behavior. So, they decided to
put a manga comic on the bottle to
entertain the kids. But here is the
problem. The kids will just read it and
still not finish the milk. So, they used
white ink. When the bottle is full of
milk, the comic is invisible. The only
way to read the story is to chug the
milk. Curiosity hacked their brain and
the waste dropped to zero. This is
